ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "restaurant_name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "country_code" INTEGER /* Country where the restaurant is located */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the restaurant is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the restaurant */,
  "locality" TEXT /* Locality of the restaurant */,
  "locality_verbose" TEXT /* Verbose locality of the restaurant */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the restaurant's location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the restaurant's location */,
  "cuisines" TEXT /* Cuisines served by the restaurant */,
  "average_cost_for_two" INTEGER /* Average cost for two people */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency used for the average cost */,
  "has_table_booking" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant has table booking */,
  "has_online_delivery" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant has online delivery */,
  "is_delivering_now" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant is currently delivering */,
  "switch_to_order_menu" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant has an order menu */,
  "price_range" INTEGER /* Price range of the restaurant */,
  "aggregate_rating" REAL /* Aggregate rating of the restaurant */,
  "rating_color" TEXT /* Color of the rating (e.g., Dark Green) */,
  "rating_text" TEXT /* Text description of the rating (e.g., Excellent) */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes or reviews for the restaurant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the restaurant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the restaurant was last updated */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the restaurant */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* Image URL of the restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_code" INTEGER /* Country code where the city is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the city is located */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the city is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_phone_code" INTEGER /* Phone code of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cuisines" (
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cuisine */,
  "cuisine_name" TEXT /* Name of the cuisine */,
  "cuisine_description" TEXT /* Description of the cuisine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_cuisines" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cuisine */,
  "is_primary_cuisine" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cuisine is primary for the restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id", "cuisine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, restaurant owner, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant where the order was placed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency used for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "menu_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each menu item */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant offering the item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the menu item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the menu item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the menu item */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency used for the price */,
  "cuisine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cuisine of the menu item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the menu item (e.g., appetizer, main course, dessert) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the menu item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the menu item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_cuisine_id FOREIGN KEY ("cuisine_id") REFERENCES cuisines ("cuisine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_menu_items_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_images_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_promotions_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (out of 5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_ratings_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurant_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
